blockingIssues.description: The rerun still misses the zero-ASCII end state because it adds and retains ASCII-specific test references, including the new purge-dual-shader-and-ascii-refs test.
Pre-existing visual test suites still contain extensive ASCII and Hermes references, so the original purge blocker remains unresolved.
FilmGrainOverlay still renders procedural SVG noise instead of the required vendored film-grain GIF texture overlay.
Legacy accent-card styling still ships in visible tokenomics, roadmap, and architecture modules instead of the required LiquidMetalCard treatment.
Multiple visible supporting panels still bypass LiquidMetalCard, so cursor-tracking metallic sheen is not present across all card surfaces.
globals.css still defines blue border or glow and green glow UI utilities, so #455eff and #00ff00 remain available outside atmospheric gradients and status-dot contexts.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/tradebetter-exact-design-reference.md` so the atmosphere summary now records film grain texture only and explicitly excludes separate scanline layers.

Updated `.factory/library/tradebetter-comparison-evidence.md` to mark older blue-accent border and CTA notes as raw tradebetter reference evidence rather than canonical BETTER implementation guidance under the stricter visual-re-engineering color rules.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a visual fix contract requires an exact asset or implementation class, require workers to add regression coverage that asserts that exact requirement instead of only generic overlay behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `redesign-remove-scanline-enforce-shader-plus-grain-only` review found that `single-shader-and-film-grain.test.tsx` only checked generic overlay properties, allowing procedural SVG noise to pass even though mission guidance required a film-grain GIF overlay.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require transcript-visible `agent-browser` activity or an explicit citation of reused browser evidence before workers mark `followedProcedure=true` on user-facing visual changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `redesign-remove-scanline-enforce-shader-plus-grain-only` review found no `agent-browser` session in transcript `85b07877-075a-4008-a451-8bbb32c1bdb9` even though the skill makes browser validation mandatory and the handoff still reported `followedProcedure=true`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile liquid-metal card blur guidance across mission feature briefs and shared design guidance so workers are not told to both use `blur(10px)` and avoid backdrop blur.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `redesign-liquid-metal-cursor-tracking-everywhere-and-accent-card-cleanup` review found `features.json` requiring `backdrop-filter: blur(10px)` while mission AGENTS and shared library references say the approved liquid-metal cards should have no backdrop blur.

rejectedObservations.observation: Clarify whether ASCII-purge fixes must also remove historical ASCII mentions from tests and comments.
